accountManagement.subtitle: Manage multi-platform accounts, spaces, authorization status, and plugin-based account connections in one place. Work data, private-message leads, and the publish calendar will read available accounts from here.
accountManagement.tip: Account Management is now a first-level page. Connect, group, filter, and remove accounts here instead of using the modal as the primary workflow.
accountManagement.metrics.spacesHint: Group accounts by team, brand, or business line
accountManagement.metrics.pluginHint: Accounts depending on browser plugin or local Bridge
acquisition.subtitle: Multi-platform clothing AI acquisition workspace
acquisition.placeholder: Phase 1 route shell. More live data will be connected in later phases.
acquisition.schedule.title: Schedule publish
acquisition.strategy.hooksPlaceholder: Hook CRUD will use the Phase 2 API
acquisition.strategy.scriptsPlaceholder: Script CRUD will use the Phase 2 API
acquisition.strategy.accountsPlaceholder: Account strategy CRUD will use the Phase 2 API
workData.title: Work Data
workData.heroEyebrow: Data Intake · Comment Snapshots · Lead Signals
workData.description: Manage and monitor multi-platform works, fetch engagement metrics and real comments, providing data support for lead conversion.
workData.postIdTooltip: Optional, if not filled, it will be parsed from the link
workData.validation.postUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid work URL
workData.capability.title: Platform Fetch Capability
workData.capability.cta.permission: Current account lacks comment read permission. Please apply for item.comment in the platform console and re-authorize.
workData.capability.cta.xhsConfig: Please install and connect the browser plugin, or start local XHS Bridge.
workData.capability.cta.kwaiPending: Kwai comment fetch capability is pending confirmation. Currently only recording monitored works, no real fetching.
acquisition.pages.leads.title: Leads
acquisition.pages.leads.subtitle: This page will centralize comment and private-message leads, fetch private-message data from connected accounts in Account Management, display conversations and messages, and support stage transitions, AI suggested replies, manual confirmation, assignment, and WeChat lead marking.
acquisition.pages.leads.features.list.de: Filter leads by platform, account, work, stage, status, and assignee, with search, pagination, and batch operations.
acquisition.pages.leads.features.message: Fetch private-message conversations and messages from connected RedNote, Douyin, and Kwai accounts in Account Management, then display account, user, latest message, message time, unread state, and handling status.
acquisition.pages.leads.features.reply.d: Generate suggested replies from the comment, product context, and available script templates. Public replies require manual confirmation by default.
Support claim, assign, transfer, and batch assign flows, tracking owner, latest follow-up time, and overdue state.
acquisition.pages.leads.features.timelin: Show source work, comment or private-message timeline, notes, assignment records, and stage changes in lead details.
acquisition.pages.strategy.title: Operation Strategy
acquisition.pages.strategy.subtitle: This page will manage content hooks, reply scripts, account-level operation rules, and sensitive-word checks so content and replies reuse improvable strategy assets.
acquisition.pages.strategy.features.hook: Maintain follow, private-message, benefit, sizing, and WeChat guide hooks, with weighted selection during content generation.
acquisition.pages.strategy.features.scri: Cover price, link, sizing, negative feedback, and private-message scenes, with variables and risk levels.
acquisition.pages.strategy.features.risk: Check contact details, sensitive words, and public-comment restrictions when saving templates, generating AI output, publishing, or replying.
acquisition.pages.strategy.features.acco: Configure daily publish limits, interaction limits, default script strategy, content-generation participation, and comment-fetch participation.
acquisition.pages.dashboard.title: Acquisition Dashboard
acquisition.pages.dashboard.subtitle: This page will summarize the funnel from exposure, interaction, comments, intent, WeChat guidance, to added WeChat leads, broken down by platform, account, work, and strategy.
acquisition.pages.dashboard.features.met: Show publish count, exposure, interactions, comments, intent leads, WeChat guidance, added WeChat leads, and conversion rate.
acquisition.pages.dashboard.features.fun: Visualize exposure to comments, comments to intent, intent to WeChat guidance, and guidance to added WeChat conversion.
acquisition.pages.dashboard.features.tre: Support 7-day trends, work ranking, platform comparison, account comparison, and content-style filtering.
acquisition.pages.dashboard.features.str: Aggregate performance by hook, script, account, and content template to guide future strategy iteration.
